final:
module RefModule(input clk, input [7:0] a, input [7:0] b, input [1:0] op, output [7:0] result);reg [7:0] final_sig;
  
  always @ (posedge clk) begin
    case(op)
      2'b00: final_sig <= a + b; // Addition
      2'b01: final_sig <= a - b; // Subtraction
      2'b10: final_sig <= a * b; // Multiplication
      2'b11: final_sig <= a / b; // Division
      default: final_sig <= 8'b0; // Default value
    endcase
  end
  
  assign result = final_sig;
endmodule
